revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:MediaWiki messages/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:MediaWiki messages/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:MediaWiki messages/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:MediaWiki messages/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:MediaWiki messages/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:MediaWiki messages/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This navigational template is included by {{tl|interface explanation}}, which is used on MediaWiki talk: pages to describe the relevant message. {{Collapsible option}} == See also == {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:MediaWiki Help| ]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:MediaWiki interface templates|Δ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == This navigational template is included by {{tl|interface explanation}}, which is used on MediaWiki talk: pages to describe the relevant message. {{Collapsible option}} == See also == {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:MediaWiki Help| ]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] [[Category:MediaWiki interface templates|Δ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
